top_signals.title: Oil Drops as US Says Deal With Iran and Hormuz Reopening Is Near
top_signals.summary: Oil dropped as the US and Iran edged toward a deal, although President Donald Trump said that Washington’s blockade of the Strait of Hormuz would remain until an agreement was completed.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Dollar Slides, US Stock Futures Jump as Oil Falls: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Oil and the dollar fell while US stock futures climbed as risk appetite improved on hopes that a deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and restore crude flows could be close.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: The Crumbling Pillars of Global Peace
top_signals.summary: War, empire, and the forgotten power of the United Nations.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
